title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 291.140 - Director to investigate serious accidents — recommendations
text:
291.140.  Director to investigate serious accidents — recommendations. — The director of the inspection section shall make an investigation of all accidents serious enough to require physical rehabilitation, under the provisions of the state board of rehabilitation, and make safety recommendations to the employers of the injured employees.
(L. 1965 p. 440 § 1)
